title: Terminnus Crates
description: Crates that give you some cool loot!
body:
This mod adds crates, a new block that randomly generates all around the world, that drops loot when broken.

# **Crate tiers**
This mod adds 4 different crate tiers: Normal, Iron, Gold, and Diamond.


<details>
<summary>Normal Crate</summary>
  
  ![Normal Crate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9845ee03804f8c937f2c06108f7209881d3da339.png)
  
- Stick (1-5)
- Rotten Flesh (1-2)
- Oak Planks (1-4)
- Seeds (1-4)
- Leather (1-3)
- Coal (1-3)
- Torch (1-3)
- Raw Copper (1-2)
- Raw Iron (1-2)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Iron Crate</summary>

![Iron Crate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c8542d69d737b34d7d965b878919f93baccbdad.png)

- Coal (1-5)
- Cooked Beef (1-4)
- Oak Log (1-6)
- Torch (1-4)
- Arrow (1-4)
- Copper (1-3)
- Iron (1-4)
- Gold Nugget (1-4)
- Raw Gold (1-2)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Gold Crate</summary>
  
![Gold Crate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad6efa41634297bd601b785a09e8a758ded87d40.png)

- Iron (1-4)
- Gold Nugget (1-6)
- Gold (1-4)
- Cooked Beef (1-3)
- Arrow (1-4)
- Lapis Lazuli (1-4)
- Redstone (1-4)
- Experience Bottle (1-3)
- Diamond (1-2)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Diamond Crate</summary>

![Diamond Crate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69c3fb869d19bfd42fe8c1f14335928ec8910a91.png)

- Emerald (1-6)
- Redstone (1-8)
- Gold (1-4)
- Golden Apple (1-3)
- Lapis Lazuli (1-4)
- Golden Carrot (1-4)
- Spectral Arrow (1-4)
- Diamond (1-4)
- Name Tag (1-2)

</details>

# Generation
Crates can be generated alone, or in piles all around the world.



PD: feel free to use this mod as an API for your mods!
